login.subtitle: A human-like AI teacher that teaches you any concept from a text-based PDF document
login.signinError: Sign-in didn’t complete. Please try again.
login.freeStart: Free to start · No credit card needed
login.privacy: Your data is private and secure — we never train on your documents.
login.avatarAlt: Friendly AI teacher holding a notebook of lessons, ready to begin
login.footer: © 2026 AI Voice Tutor for Documents · Learn smarter, by voice.

upload.dropHint: Drop a file here, or <choose>choose file</choose>
upload.pdfHint: Use a text-based PDF. Image-only or scanned documents can't be read and won't work.
upload.processingBody: Extracting pages, building lesson passages, and warming up the teacher.

library.emptyHint: No documents yet — upload your first to get started.

delete.title: Delete document?
delete.body: This permanently removes “{{name}}” from your library. This action cannot be undone.

restart.title: Restart the lesson?
restart.body: This clears the current chat and starts a fresh session from the beginning. This action cannot be undone.

mic.title: Turn on your microphone
mic.body: Your browser is blocking microphone access, so the voice lesson can't hear you. The browser won't ask again automatically — please re-enable it in your browser settings:
mic.step1: Click the icon on the left of the address bar (a lock, tune/sliders, or microphone icon).
mic.step2: Find "Microphone" and set it to Allow — or click "Reset permission".
mic.step4: Press Call again, then choose Allow if asked.
mic.note: Once you set it to Allow, the lesson resumes automatically — or just press Call again.

pages.title: Pick your lesson pages
pages.body: Choose up to {{max}} pages. Your teacher will explain them one by one, from the first page, checking you understood each idea before moving on.
pages.pageAtMost: You can pick at most {{max}} pages

teacher.title: AI Teacher
teacher.transcriptEmpty: No conversation yet — your lesson transcript will appear here.
teacher.micUnsupported: Microphone is not supported in this browser.
teacher.micBlocked: Microphone is blocked. Tap here for steps to turn it back on.

status.tapStart: Tap Call to start your lesson

question.title: Your turn
question.getReady: Take a moment, then answer aloud
question.hint: Speak your answer. This closes on its own.

workspace.loadingHint: Fetching pages and preparing the board…
